## Purpose

Describe the purpose of this historical document.

Explain:

- Why this history is maintained.
- Who should read it.
- What type of information is recorded.

This document should summarize project evolution without replacing the Sprint Journal.

---

## Scope

This document records the evolution of the Melody Sync project at a high level.

Include:

- Major milestones.
- Significant architectural changes.
- Important project achievements.
- Version evolution.

Exclude:

- Detailed implementation.
- Sprint-level discussions.
- Source code changes.
